en.extract:
The bare-legged swiftlet (Aerodramus nuditarsus) is a species of swift in the family Apodidae. It is found in New Guinea, in subtropical and tropical moist montane forests.

The '''bare-legged swiftlet''' ('''''Aerodramus nuditarsus''''') is a species of [[Swift (bird)|swift]] in the family [[Apodidae]]. It is found in [[New Guinea]], in subtropical and tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.<ref name="iucn status 15 November 2021" />

zh.extract:
裸腿金丝燕（学名：Aerodramus nuditarsus）是雨燕科的一种金丝燕，分布于印度尼西亚和巴布亚新几内亚。
